mapper.sql: chapter_id, course_id, chapter_name, sort_order, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag
mapper.select: select from jst_course_chapter where chapter_id = #{chapterId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select from jst_course_chapter where course_id = #{courseId} and del_flag = '0' order by sort_order asc, chapter_id asc
mapper.update: update jst_course_chapter set chapter_name = #{entity.chapterName}, sort_order = #{entity.sortOrder}, update_by = #{entity.updateBy}, update_time = #{entity.updateTime} where chapter_id = #{entity.chapterId} and del_flag = '0'
